channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utes lose home finale to West Virginia, 71-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Senior Night did not go the way the Utes basketball hoped. Javon Small scored 18 points to help West Virginia beat its former coach Josh Eilert and Utah 71-69 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 1 Auburn falls 83-72 to No. 22 Texas A&M behind Zhuric Phelps' 19 points
item.description: Zhuric Phelps scored 19 points off the bench and No. 22 Texas A&M never trailed in an 83-72 win over top-ranked Auburn on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL and is out for the season
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL in his left knee and will miss the rest of the season, the biggest setback in a season full of them for a team that traded superstar Luka Doncic.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings decline franchise tag option for Sam Darnold despite breakout season: report
item.description: While Sam Darnold largely thrived his first season with the Vikings, the quarterback's future in Minnesota is murky after the team opted against using its franchise tag for him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dublin: Beloved Emerald High basketball coach will not return, district says
item.description: Supporters of Jason Rockwell, known as "Coach Rock" last week showed up in droves at a Dublin Unified School District board meeting demanding Rockwell keep his job.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Martin, The Mercury News

item.title: Times Square boxing event in May promises to be big, with 3 fights and talk of half a million fans
item.description: Big boxing in New York for long meant Madison Square Garden, in recent years Barclays Center as well.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Jets part ways with Davante Adams after less than one season: report
item.description: The Jets decision to release Davante Adams will result in salary cap savings. The star receiver can sign with another NFL team once he officially enters the free agent market.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bruins trade big forward Trent Frederic to the Oilers in a 3-team deal with the Devils
item.description: The defending Western Conference champion Edmonton Oilers made their first big move ahead of the NHL trade deadline Tuesday, acquiring hard-nosed forward Trent Frederic from the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Golf legend John Daly reveals bloody truth about bladder cancer battle
item.description: Golf legend John Daly revealed during a recent podcast appearance that his bladder cancer has been in remission for the past four years.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Attorneys in college sports lawsuit point to 'intergalactic paradigm shift' for NCAA
item.description: Attorneys seeking approval of the $2.8 billion legal settlement for college sports pointed to nearly 102,000 athletes who signed up to receive damages from the action, while batting down objections to what they described as the “intergalactic paradigm shift” the settlement will create across the NCA
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Elizabeth Warren gives mocking gesture while helping to block bill keeping males out of women's sports
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., was seen giving an exaggerated thumbs down gesture while voting no on the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL reporter Michele Tafoya theorizes why bill to keep men out of women's sports failed in Senate
item.description: Former NFL reporter Michele Tafoya told OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich" about why she thinks the bill to protect women's sports failed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Hill broadcast to feature few commercial and more player-caddie chatter
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — The Arnold Palmer Invitational will have fewer commercials and more emphasis on data and player-caddie interactions as part of a pilot program a key sponsor has endorsed.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fulham condemns 'vile' racist and homophobic online abuse aimed at defender Bassey
item.description: LONDON (AP) — English soccer club Fulham has condemned the “racist and homophobic abuse” aimed at defender Calvin Bassey on social media following the FA Cup win at Manchester United on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Katherine Legge to be the 1st woman in 7 years to compete in NASCAR Cup Series race
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Katherine Legge will become the first woman in a NASCAR Cup Series race since Danica Patrick in 2018 when the veteran makes her debut Sunday at Phoenix Raceway. Legge will drive the No. 78 Chevrolet for Live Fast Motorsports.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg stars once more in his possible farewell at Cameron Indoor Stadium
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke was minutes away from completing a perfect record on its famed home court with a Senior Night rout of Wake Forest. That's when the buzzer sounded for freshman phenom Cooper Flagg, who checked out — possibly for the final time at Cameron Indoor Stadium.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavs' Kyrie Irving suffers left knee sprain, shoots free throws before leaving game
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kyrie Irving suffered a left knee sprain Monday night and shot free throws for the Mavericks — with tears rolling down his cheeks — before leaving the floor in obvious pain late in the first quarter of Dallas' 122-98 loss to the Sacramento Kings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC officials denounce homophobic chant heard at inaugural home match
item.description: "What took place during our first-ever home match does not reflect who we are as a club or the values we stand for," SDFC officials said in a statement Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah wins third straight, dominating Minnesota, 6-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller tallied a career-high five points (one goal, four assists) and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 6-1 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies go cold in 82-65 loss at Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State saw a five-game winning streak over Boise State come to an end Wednesday night at ExtraMile Arena, falling to the Broncos in an 82-65 road battle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFLPA Survey: Matt Eberflus rated worst head coach in 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The NFL Players Association released the results of their annual players survey Wednesday at the NFL Scouting Combine.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
